// <auto-generated/>

#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS0612, CS0618 // Use of obsolete APIs is natural when we're emitting delegates for obsolete properties.
#pragma warning disable CS0436 // Use of local types when imported types by the same name exist.

namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.MyEnum> MyEnum => __MyEnum ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __MyEnum, __Create_MyEnum());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.MyEnum>? __MyEnum;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.MyEnum> __Create_MyEnum()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenEnumTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.MyEnum, int>
            {
                UnderlyingTypeFactory = () => Int32,
                Members = __CreateMemberDictionary_MyEnum(),
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

        private static global::System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, int> __CreateMemberDictionary_MyEnum()
        {
            return new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>
            {
                ["First"] = 1,
                ["None"] = 0,
                ["Second"] = 2,
                ["Third"] = 3,
            };
        }
    }
}
